scenarios.description: traverse over multiple Elements iterates each Element in sequence
scenarios.precondition: visitor non-null; Elements contains two distinct Element roots
scenarios.expectedResult: each Element head and tail invoked once in separate Node overload calls; no exception
pseudocode: TEST TC17 traverse with multiple elements
NodeVisitor visitor that records head/tail events
Elements elements = new Elements(new Element("a"), new Element("b"));

scenarios.description: traverse(elements) throws IllegalArgumentException when visitor is null
scenarios.expectedResult: IllegalArgumentException is thrown for null visitor
pseudocode: TEST TC18 null-visitor for elements overload

scenarios.description: traverse propagates RuntimeException thrown in tail
scenarios.path: B0→B1→B5→B11→B12→B23→B1→... then tail at leaf throws
pseudocode: TEST TC19 propagate exception from tail
